user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new audit recurrence pattern, so that attendance audits repeat automatically on a defined schedule
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Audit Recurrence Pattern screen; When I click Add new recurrence pattern and define the pattern, location and work area; Then the recurrence pattern is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view recurrence patterns with their location and work area, so that I can see when and where audits recur
acceptance_criteria: Given recurrence patterns exist; When I open the Audit Recurrence Pattern screen; Then each pattern is listed with its recurrence pattern, location and work area

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing recurrence pattern, so that I can adjust audit timing for a location or work area
acceptance_criteria: Given a recurrence pattern is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated pattern is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the recurrence pattern list, so that I see the most recent configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Audit Recurrence Pattern screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
